title: Data Enhancement Path
description: Build fluency in Data Enhancement inside Data Preprocessing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Data Augmentation
steps.summary: Techniques used to artificially increase the size of a dataset by applying transformations to existing data. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Enhancement. Start after Augmentation. It opens into DL (Data Augmentation) and GAN-based Data Augmentation.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Synthetic Data Generation
steps.summary: Synthetic Data Generation belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Enhancement. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Enhancement. Compare it with DL (Data Augmentation) and Data-centric validation. It opens into AI in Synthetic Data Generation and Synthetic Data Generation for Bias Mitigation.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: GAN-based Data Augmentation
steps.summary: GAN-based Data Augmentation belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Enhancement. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Enhancement. Start after Data Augmentation and Augmentation.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Data Augmentation for Reinforcement Learning
steps.summary: Data Augmentation for Reinforcement Learning belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Enhancement. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Enhancement. Start after Data Augmentation and Augmentation.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: DL (Data Augmentation)
steps.summary: DL (Data Augmentation) belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Enhancement. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Enhancement. Start after Data Augmentation and Augmentation.

steps.title: Bigram Swap
steps.summary: Bigram Swap belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Enhancement. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Enhancement. Compare it with Random Bigram Swap and Adjacent Bigram Swap. It opens into Random Bigram Swap and Adjacent Bigram Swap.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Data-Centric AI

steps.title: Data-centric validation
